case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS KNOPP, JENNIFER E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $704.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KNOPP, JENNIFER E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KNOPP, JENNIFER E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOPP, JENNIFER E. $704.90 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $730.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, FILED. COPY MAILED TO DEFT. SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR ORDER.
PER ORDER OF COMM, MOTION FOR RECON IS DENIED W/O PREJUDICE. PLTF CAN SUBMIT A STIPULATION/ORDER TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT & DISMISS THE ACTION.
